tasks.label: dev
tasks.detail: Generate code and start Next.js dev server with hot reload

tasks.label: build
tasks.detail: Generate code and create production Next.js standalone build

tasks.label: start
tasks.detail: Start the production standalone server

tasks.label: clean
tasks.detail: Remove .next, coverage, generated code, dev database, and supergraph

tasks.label: generate
tasks.detail: Run all code generation (Prisma client, schema bundling, GraphQL codegen)

tasks.label: generate:prisma
tasks.detail: Generate Prisma client from schema.prisma

tasks.label: generate:schema
tasks.detail: Bundle GraphQL SDL files into TypeScript for standalone builds

tasks.label: generate:graphql
tasks.detail: Generate TypeScript resolver types from GraphQL schemas

tasks.label: db:migrate
tasks.detail: Create and apply Prisma migrations (dev)

tasks.label: db:deploy
tasks.detail: Apply pending Prisma migrations (production)

tasks.label: db:studio
tasks.detail: Open Prisma Studio database browser

tasks.label: supergraph
tasks.detail: Compose Apollo Federation supergraph via rover (requires dev server)

tasks.label: type-check
tasks.detail: Run TypeScript compiler with no emit to check for type errors

tasks.label: test-watch
tasks.detail: Run Vitest in watch mode for interactive development

tasks.label: test
tasks.detail: Run Vitest once and exit

tasks.label: check-translations
tasks.detail: Verify locale and unit-test mock translation keys match English

tasks.label: lint
tasks.detail: Check for ESLint violations without fixing

tasks.label: lint-fix
tasks.detail: Auto-fix ESLint violations where possible

tasks.label: format
tasks.detail: Format all files with Prettier

tasks.label: format-check
tasks.detail: Check formatting without writing changes

tasks.label: full-check
tasks.detail: Generate, format, lint-fix, type-check, test, and build

tasks.label: full-check-ci
tasks.detail: CI variant: generate, format-check, lint, type-check, test, and build

tasks.label: full-check:dev
tasks.detail: Generate, format, lint-fix, type-check, test, build, then start the dev server

tasks.label: upgrade
tasks.detail: Upgrade all dependencies in package.json with npm-check-updates and install

tasks.label: upgrade-check
tasks.detail: Show available dependency upgrades without modifying package.json
